content.problemStatement:
Given are the two distinct words startWord and targetWord, and a list denoting
    wordList of unique words of equal lengths. Find the length of the shortest transformation sequence from startWord to
    targetWord..
constraints: startWord, targetWord, and all words in wordList consist of lowercase English letters.
startWord is not equal to targetWord.
All the strings in the wordList along with the startWord and targetWord are unique.
content.inputFormat: The input will contain three parameters: startWord (string), targetWord (string), and wordList (array of strings).
content.outputFormat: The output will be an integer representing the length of the shortest transformation sequence from startWord to targetWord.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a breadth-first search (BFS) algorithm to explore all possible transformations from the startWord.
